reason: Fix TS2344/TS2536 — use (DesktopHostSlotMap & Slots)[Name] so keys from Slots resolve correctly
Fix TS2552/TS2304 — TuiPlugin and DesktopPlugin are used in PluginModule union but were never imported

 import { type ToolDefinition } from "./tool.js"

+import type { TuiPlugin } from "./tui.js"

+export type * from "./desktop.js"
 
 export * from "./tool.js"

   server: Plugin
